_fields.bookingRef: Booking number for modify/cancel. Format: two letters, hyphen, 5 digits, e.g. AB-12345. null for new_booking
_fields.pickupCity: Pickup city. Allowed: Tel Aviv, Haifa (for new_booking)
_fields.returnDateAndTime: Return date/time in ISO 8601, must be after pickup
_fields.paymentCard: Required for new_booking. cardNumber, expiryDate (MM/YY), cvv, cardholderName
_fields.additionalNotes: Free text: child seat, airport pickup, urgency (URGENT, ASAP), etc.
